# tab.Container: badgePositions

right now, `tabContainer` only honors `dock: top`.

<img width="570" alt="Screenshot 2022-10-02 at 17 51 20" src="https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/1177434/193463223-f2832a61-3374-4ceb-8a72-60ca9131f6bd.png">

we need to add support for left & right in a smart way.
